{"id":"project-LICHEN-tm5k","title":"codec.rs: No validation that IPv6 version field is 6 in compress_* helpers","description":"File: rust/lichen-schc/src/codec.rs
Lines: 268-323, 326-364, 367-412, 415-456, 463-528 (compress_coap, compress_icmpv6_echo, compress_rpl_dio, compress_rpl_dao, compress_mqtt_sn)

Category: CORRECTNESS

The individual compress_* helper functions validate packet length but do not verify the IPv6 version nibble (packet[0] >> 4 == 6). They trust that the caller (compress()) has already verified this.

The main compress() function does check version at line 815:
```rust
if packet.len() < 40 || packet[0] >> 4 != 6 {
    // Not IPv6 — uncompressed fallback
    ...
}
```

However, the helper functions are private (fn, not pub fn), so they cannot be called directly from outside the module. This is correct encapsulation.

Impact: None currently since helpers are private. If any helper is made pub in the future, it would need its own version check.

Note: This is more of a code hygiene observation than a bug. Filing for documentation/future-proofing.","status":"open","priority":3,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:41:43.762337Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:41:43.762369Z"}
